# zstack_sns_topic (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage SNS topics in ZStack. An SNS topic is a communication channel for sending notifications.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the SNS topic.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the SNS topic.

### Read-Only

- `state` (String) The current state of the SNS topic.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the SNS topic.
